Name: FPassiveSoundMixModifier
Description: Structure containing information on a SoundMix to activate passively.

Variables.Name: MinVolumeThreshold
Variables.Description: Minimum volume level required to activate SoundMix. Below this value the SoundMix will not be active.

Variables.Name: MaxVolumeThreshold
Variables.Description: Maximum volume level required to activate SoundMix. Above this value the SoundMix will not be active.
